Window.Title: VoiceAgend
WhatsNew.Title: What's new
WhatsNew.Empty: No release notes found. You may be offline, or no releases have been published yet.
WhatsNew.ReadFull: Read the full notes on GitHub →
About.Title: About VoiceAgend
About.Tagline: Self-hosted speech-to-text for Windows — fast, local, hotkey-driven.
About.BugHint: Bug reports open a pre-filled form on GitHub. Please include reproduction steps and an excerpt of the log file (Settings → System → "Open log").
Setup.Title: Welcome to VoiceAgend
Setup.Intro: Enter your server URL and API key. If you have used this key on another device, your settings will be loaded automatically.
Setup.ErrorEmpty: Please enter both server URL and API key.
Home.Title: Last transcript
Home.Placeholder: The most recent transcript appears here. You can select, copy or edit it.
Home.Hotkey.On: Hotkey enabled — recording via shortcut is available.
Home.Hotkey.Off: Hotkey disabled — recording only via UI/tray.
Upload.Headline: Transcribe audio file
Upload.Subline: Drop a file here or click "Browse". WAV files are compressed before upload.
Upload.UnsupportedFormat: Format not supported (WAV, MP3, M4A, OGG, OPUS, FLAC, AAC, WEBM, WMA).
Upload.BusyHint: Please wait — another recording/transcription is in progress.
Home.History.Label: History
Home.Prompt.Label: Initial prompt
Home.Prompt.Empty: No prompt set — configure in server profile settings.
Settings.Title: Settings
Settings.HotkeyHint: Toggle: press to start, again to stop.
Settings.Subtitle.Connection: Server URL, language and API key
Settings.Lang.AutoHint: More reliable for short clips (<10 s) when language is set explicitly.
Settings.Hotkey: Hotkey (toggle: press to start, again to stop)
OutputMode.DirectInsert: Smart (UI Automation, falls back to typing)
Settings.TypingSpeed.Hint: Characters per second. Lower = more stable in apps that struggle with rapid key events (browsers, chat inputs). Higher = faster, but the final characters may stutter.
Profile.Title: Server profile
Profile.Description: These settings are stored per API key on the server and applied to every transcription.
Profile.Prompt.Hint: Biased vocabulary, proper nouns, style. Applied per language — Whisper would otherwise lock onto the prompt's language and misdetect.
Profile.Prompt.AutoHint: In auto mode no prompt is sent — otherwise Whisper would infer the language from the prompt.
Profile.TempHint: 0.0 = deterministic (recommended for dictation). Higher values = more freedom and variance.
Models.Title: Whisper cache
Models.Description: Downloads the selected model into the server's Whisper cache. Larger models take several minutes.
Models.Confirm.UninstallBodyFmt: {0} ({1}) will be removed from the Whisper cache. You will need to download it again if you want to use it later.
Models.Hint.Tiny: Fast, tiny footprint — quality sufficient for dictation with clear speech.
Models.Hint.Base: Good balance between speed and quality for mobile or weak servers.
Models.Hint.Small: Noticeably better than Base, still very fast on CPU.
Models.Hint.Medium: Default recommendation. Roughly real-time on modern 6-core CPUs.
Models.Hint.LargeV3: Highest quality, considerably slower on CPU (~3× real-time).
Models.Hint.LargeV3Turbo: Multilingual, ~4× faster than Large v3 with nearly identical quality. Recommended for 8 GB GPUs.
Models.Hint.DistilLargeV3: Distilled variant — near Large quality at Medium speed. English only.
Models.EmptyHint: No models installed on the server yet. Pick one from the search below and click "Install".
Update.Toast.Title: VoiceAgend update available
Update.NotInstalled: Not installed via the installer — auto-update disabled.
Profile.AutoSwitchedFmt: Active model was not installed — automatically switched to '{0}'.
Profile.NoApiKey: Set API key in settings first.
